source_status: public frontier scan using preprints, benchmark descriptions, and synthetic implementation artifacts
claim_status: research-organization infrastructure claim, not a biological or clinical claim
privacy_status: public-safe synthetic packet only; no personal, clinical, veterinary, or private longitudinal data included
missingness: no production corpus, no curator labels, no live external database calls, and no clinical validation included
revision_reason: frontier work increasingly evaluates inspectable scientific workflows rather than final-answer plausibility alone
implementation_status: schema, validator, fixtures, and regression test created for repository use

source_map.claim_supported: scientific-agent evaluation should be grounded in real studies, datasets, code repositories, and exploratory workflows
source_map.caveat: preprint status; benchmark utility still depends on external adoption and replication

source_map.claim_supported: biomedical hypothesis systems benefit from graph-grounded evidence, retrievable support, and human-in-the-loop inspection
source_map.caveat: exploratory translational-oncology system, not validated as a clinical decision system

source_map.claim_supported: biomedical hypothesis generation needs structured and textual sources plus self-evaluation for novelty and relevance
source_map.caveat: benchmark-oriented evidence, not direct proof of discovery outcomes

source_map.claim_supported: retrieval-grounded medical systems require joint privacy and utility evaluation because contextual leakage can occur without explicit identifiers
source_map.caveat: synthetic benchmark and automated judge require careful interpretation

workflow_boundary.dataset_boundary: synthetic fixture only; no patient, animal, lab, or private longitudinal dataset is used
workflow_boundary.code_boundary: validator checks packet structure and does not execute scientific analysis or claim truth
workflow_boundary.literature_boundary: source map records external frontier claims but does not import full papers or hidden evidence
workflow_boundary.tool_boundary: gate validates inspectability metadata only; it does not diagnose, treat, or recommend interventions

hypothesis_route.starting_question: Can discovery memory promote a scientific hypothesis only when its workflow route is inspectable?
structured_evidence_route: map source claims into workflow requirements
separate generation route from critique route
require privacy leakage route before memory promotion
require human checkpoint with promote, hold, revise, and reject decisions
hypothesis_route.candidate_hypothesis: Inspectable workflow packets will reduce unsupported discovery-memory promotion compared with final-answer-only packets.
hypothesis_route.ranking_basis: prioritize packets with source diversity, explicit boundaries, critique failure modes, privacy leakage review, and falsification route

critique_route.critic_role: repository-level evaluator checking whether a hypothesis can be reconstructed without hidden reasoning
main_failure_modes: plausible final answer with no dataset, code, or literature boundary
hypothesis promoted despite missing privacy leakage analysis
claim framed as cure or treatment instead of research organization
critique_route.revision_trigger: revise packet if any route is missing, advice-like, unbounded, non-falsifiable, or privacy ambiguous

privacy_leakage_route.sensitive_context: health, animal-health, and longitudinal observations can become identifying through rare combinations
privacy_leakage_route.leakage_risk: retrieval-grounded memory may expose contextual details even when direct identifiers are absent
privacy_leakage_route.mitigation: use synthetic fixtures, typed placeholders, explicit privacy status, and human checkpoint before promotion
privacy_leakage_route.residual_risk: real deployments still need privacy testing against membership, linkage, and attribute inference attacks

falsification_route: Compare curator agreement and unsupported-promotion rate between final-answer-only packets and inspectable workflow packets.
next_executable_action: Run the regression test for this gate and add CI wiring if it passes.
